creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The USB stack has changed signifigently since the 6 and 7 days. If this 
is still a bug please open a *new* PR and reference this one.  It is 
very likely that the bug has either been fixed or now manifests itself 
completely differently by now.  Any questions - feel free to email me.
